series_metadata.series_description: Includes information about clients/businesses who request testing and/or lab services. Information is maintained on a monthly basis, lists the requesting parties, the test/service, and any other related information related to the requesting party.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for one year, then transfer to the State Records Ctr. Retain at the State Records Center for three years, then destroy pro- vided that all audits have been completed., Paper: Wastepaper
